task_completion.description: LibreOffice Calc is opened with the student scores data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A LibreOffice Calc window is visible containing the student names (Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve, Frank) and their respective scores.

task_completion.description: The Conditional Formatting dialog is opened to configure rules
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Conditional Formatting' dialog box is visible in at least one screenshot, showing conditions being set (e.g., Cell value >= 80 or < 60).
The cells containing the scores 85 (Alice), 92 (Charlie), and 95 (Frank) have a green background color.

task_completion.description: Scores < 60 are highlighted in red and others are unformatted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cells containing the scores 58 (Bob) and 45 (David) have a red background color. The cell for Eve (78) has no background color.

task_completion.description: The file is saved as formatted_scores.ods
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Calc window title bar or a Save dialog shows the filename 'formatted_scores.ods'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Calc interface, menus, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The original student names and scores were not modified
integrity.visual_evidence: The names and scores match the original data exactly (Alice:85, Bob:58, Charlie:92, David:45, Eve:78, Frank:95) without any additions or deletions.

integrity.description: Formatting was applied via rules, not manual cell coloring
integrity.visual_evidence: The Conditional Formatting dialog is seen being used to apply the colors, rather than the standard background color fill tool on the toolbar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires applying conditional formatting in LibreOffice Calc to a list of 6 students. Scores >= 80 (Alice: 85, Charlie: 92, Frank: 95) must be highlighted green. Scores < 60 (Bob: 58, David: 45) must be highlighted red. Eve's score (78) should remain unformatted. The final file must be saved as 'formatted_scores.ods'.
